title: Jan Dara: The Finale
original_title: จันดารา ปัจฉิมบท
overview: As a grown up, Jan recounts the abuse he experienced as a young boy at the hands of his sadistic father, Luang Wissanandacha. He decides to seek revenge and depose him.
